/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT FROM WALDEN HOUSE/X:COURT HAS RECEIVED A LETTER FROMWALDEN HOUSE REPRESENTING THAT DEFENDANT IS IN GOOD STANDING AND HAS COMPLETED THE 6-MONTH PROGRAM/X:NO FUTURE DATES TO BE SCHEDULED AT THIS TIME/DEF:TO REMAIN ON PROBATION/

/CAL:MOTION TO MODIFY PROBATION/X:THE COURT AND COUNSEL DISCUSSED THE MOTION AT SIDEBAR, THE COURT HAS REQUESTED THAT DEFENSE COUNSEL PROVIDE MORE INFORMATION/CONTD:FURTHER HEARING ON MOTION TO MODIFY PROBATION/
